creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Piotr Kubaj from comment #4)
Done in ports 5d33a1810484. portscout doesn't report updates for this port, Repology doesn't notify via email and GitLab watch releases (Notification settings -> Custom -> New release) doesn't seem to work.

https://repology.org/maintainer/desktop%40freebsd.org/feed-for-repo/freebsd
https://repology.org/projects/?maintainer=desktop%40freebsd.org&inrepo=freebsd&outdated=1
